batch

Class DisplayMetadata

  • java.lang.Object
    • batch.DisplayMetadata

  • public final class DisplayMetadata
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class to print media metadata in a format emulating ExifTool's -G1 -a -s -u output style.
    Since:
    5 May 2026
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

      • DisplayMetadata

        private DisplayMetadata()
        Prevents direct instantiation.
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - to indicate that direct instantiation is not supported
